perturbation_policy.budget_invalid: exceed one frozen budget limit before target use
perturbation_policy.memory_state: one bounded step across memory/context codebook
perturbation_policy.order_inversion: reverse and shuffle source rows while preserving row ids and digests; canonical replay must reproduce the same target
perturbation_policy.regulation_state: one bounded step across regulation recovery codebook
perturbation_policy.stale_state: source_current = false or outside freshness window
perturbation_policy.support_state: one bounded step lower and higher relative to support threshold
